---
title: "Differential Expression Report"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    theme: flatly
params:
  cellset: NULL
  summary: NULL
  qc: NULL
  de_results: NULL
---

---

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(ggrepel)
library(pheatmap)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 13))

cellset <- params$cellset %||% "Unknown"
summary_df <- params$summary
qc_df <- params$qc
de_results <- params$de_results

if (is.null(summary_df)) summary_df <- data.frame()
if (is.null(qc_df)) qc_df <- data.frame()
if (is.null(de_results)) de_results <- list()
```

# Cell Set: `r cellset`

---

# 1 Overview Statistics

```{r overview_table, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(summary_df) && nrow(summary_df) > 0) {

  print(knitr::kable(
    summary_df,
    caption = "Cells, UMIs and Donor Counts per Condition",
    align = "lrr"))
}
```

### Cells per condition

```{r cells_plot, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(summary_df) &&
    all(c("condition","n_cells") %in% colnames(summary_df))) {

  p <- ggplot(summary_df,
              aes(condition, n_cells)) +
    geom_col(fill="steelblue") +
    labs(title="Total Cells per Condition",
         y="Cells") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

  print(p)
}
```

### UMIs per condition

```{r umis_plot, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(summary_df) &&
    all(c("condition","n_umis") %in% colnames(summary_df))) {

  p <- ggplot(summary_df,
              aes(condition, n_umis)) +
    geom_col(fill="darkorange") +
    labs(title="Total UMIs per Condition",
         y="UMIs") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

  print(p)
}
```

### Donor balance

```{r donors_plot, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(summary_df) &&
    all(c("condition","n_donors") %in% colnames(summary_df))) {

  p <- ggplot(summary_df,
              aes(condition, n_donors)) +
    geom_col(fill="forestgreen") +
    labs(title="Donor representation per condition",
         y="Donors") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

  print(p)
}
```

---

# 2 QC Metrics

### Library size distribution

```{r qc_library, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(qc_df) &&
    all(c("condition","library_size") %in% colnames(qc_df))) {

  p <- ggplot(qc_df,
              aes(condition, library_size)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0.3) +
    labs(title="Library Size Distribution",
         y="Library size") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

  print(p)
}
```

### Cells per pseudobulk sample

```{r qc_cells, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(qc_df) &&
    all(c("condition","n_cells") %in% colnames(qc_df))) {

  p <- ggplot(qc_df,
              aes(condition, n_cells)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.alpha=0.3) +
    labs(title="Cells per Sample",
         y="Cells") +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle=45, hjust=1))

  print(p)
}
```

---

# 3 PCA of pseudobulk QC metrics

```{r pca_qc, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(qc_df) &&
    all(c("sample_id","condition","library_size","n_cells") %in% colnames(qc_df))) {

  qc_pca <- qc_df %>%
    select(sample_id, condition, library_size, n_cells) %>%
    na.omit()

  if (nrow(qc_pca) > 2) {

    mat <- scale(qc_pca[,c("library_size","n_cells")])
    pca <- prcomp(mat)

    pca_df <- data.frame(
      PC1 = pca$x[,1],
      PC2 = pca$x[,2],
      condition = qc_pca$condition
    )

    p <- ggplot(pca_df,
                aes(PC1, PC2, colour=condition)) +
      geom_point(size=3) +
      labs(title="PCA of pseudobulk QC metrics")

    print(p)
  }
}
```

---

# 4 Differential Expression Summary

```{r de_summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(de_results) && length(de_results) > 0) {

  sig_counts <- lapply(names(de_results), function(nm){

    res <- de_results[[nm]]

    if (!is.null(res) && "FDR" %in% colnames(res)) {

      data.frame(
        contrast = nm,
        significant = sum(res$FDR < 0.05, na.rm=TRUE)
      )

    }

  }) %>% bind_rows()

  if (!is.null(sig_counts) && nrow(sig_counts) > 0) {

    print(
      kable(sig_counts,
            caption="Significant genes per contrast (FDR < 0.05)")
    )

    p <- ggplot(sig_counts,
                aes(reorder(contrast, significant), significant)) +
      geom_col(fill="firebrick") +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title="Significant DE genes",
           x="Contrast",
           y="Genes")

    print(p)

  }

}
```

---

# 5 Top Gene Heatmap

```{r heatmap, echo=FALSE}
if (!is.null(de_results) && length(de_results) > 1) {

  top_genes <- lapply(de_results, function(res){

    if (!is.null(res) && "FDR" %in% colnames(res)) {
      res %>% arrange(FDR) %>% head(20) %>% pull(gene_id)
    }

  })

  top_genes <- unique(unlist(top_genes))

  if (length(top_genes) > 2) {

    mat <- sapply(de_results, function(res){

      vals <- res$logFC[match(top_genes, res$gene_id)]
      vals[is.na(vals)] <- 0
      vals

    })

    rownames(mat) <- top_genes

    pheatmap(mat,
             cluster_rows=TRUE,
             cluster_cols=TRUE,
             main="Top DE genes across contrasts")

  }

}
```

---

# 6 Contrast Details

```{r contrasts, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (!is.null(de_results) && length(de_results) > 0) {

  for (nm in names(de_results)) {

    cat("\n##", nm, "\n")

    res <- de_results[[nm]]

    if (!is.null(res) &&
        nrow(res) > 0 &&
        all(c("gene_id","logFC","FDR") %in% colnames(res))) {

      res$gene <- res$gene_id
      res$FDR[res$FDR == 0] <- 1e-300

      top10 <- res %>% arrange(FDR) %>% head(10)

      volcano <- ggplot(res,
                        aes(logFC, -log10(FDR))) +
        geom_point(aes(color = FDR < 0.05), alpha=0.6) +
        scale_color_manual(values=c("grey70","firebrick")) +
        geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05),
                   linetype="dashed",
                   colour="red") +
        ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
          data=top10,
          aes(label=gene),
          max.overlaps=10
        ) +
        labs(title=paste("Volcano:", nm),
             y="-log10(FDR)")

      print(volcano)
      
      top <- top10 %>%
        select(gene, logFC, FDR) %>%
        mutate(
          logFC = round(logFC, 3),
          FDR = formatC(FDR, format = "e", digits = 2)
          )
      
      print(knitr::kable(
        top,
        caption = "Top 10 Differentially Expressed Genes",
        align = "lrr"))

    } else {

      cat("No valid DE results available\n")

    }

  }

}
```
